sections.heading: Maxillofacial Surgery · Senior partner
sections.text: MAXILLOFACIAL SURGERY · SENIOR PARTNER Dr. Hassan Nazzal Jordanian Board–certified maxillofacial surgeon with Fellowship from the Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland. Senior partner of Bright Specialized Clinics since the early years. — MD · Jordanian Board of Maxillofacial Surgery — FRCS · Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland — Senior partner · Bright Specialized Clinics SENIOR DERMATOLOGY · LASER SPECIALIST Dr. Marina Naddaf American Academy of Dermatology member since 2004. Canadian Laser Diploma.
